name: Milliopoly - Language Quiz and Learning
short_description: Become a millionaire by using your foreign language knowledge. Invite your friends and family and practice your mother tongue or foreign languages!
detailed_description:
Become a millionaire by using your language knowledge. Invite your friends and family and practice your own native language or foreign ones! Milliopoly's goal is to assess your knowledge but also for you to have fun while learning. 

Career Mode

Gradually evolve by answering pre-established sets of questions, going through vocabulary, grammar, reading comprehension, and functions. Answer a final test at the end of each unit to test your knowledge and unlock even more challenges. Read explanations, use power-ups, and answer at your own pace. This is the best mode to start your journey through a new language!

Review Mode

Select which languages and which topics of each language you want to practice. Choose how many questions you want to answer. Timed questions will be shown randomly, between 8 and 20 per round. You will see your final result, points, and the coins you earn!

Ranked Mode

Put your knowledge to the test, with limited time for questions, and demonstrate complete mastery of the languages you select. At the end of each round of questions, you will be ranked according to your performance. Become omniscient and compete globally and with your friends.

Secret Word Mode

The best option for visual learners. Look at four images and decipher the hidden word. Do you know how to say it in other languages? Buy a hint or skip a word if it gets too difficult, but don't forget to try it in all 5 available languages, or at least in the easiest version: Polyglot, where you can type the word in any of the game's languages.

Languages available in the game: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French and Italian.

The game is meant for everyone: students in language institutes from around the world, teachers, translators, and anyone who wants to learn, practice, improve or simply have fun with their native language or foreign ones. You should be able to learn and/or practice the differences between Portuguese from Brazil and from Portugal (and from Angola, Mozambique, etc.), the multiple variants of the Spanish language, the English language, and others that get to be added.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Italian
